response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across various domains but lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows platform and domain expertise in Fixed Income or Investment Banking. The resume highlights strong skills in JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with minimal or no mention of C++ or capital markets experience.
strengths: Strong background in software development with diverse technical stack
Experience with low-latency applications and real-time systems
Open-source contributions and technical leadership roles
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory skill)
Lacks domain expertise in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets
No SQL Server or Oracle experience mentioned; unclear depth of SQL skills
